name: Bad ending party | 𝚘𝚗𝚎 𝚌𝚘𝚒𝚗𝚌𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚝𝚊𝚕 𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚔𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚕𝚞𝚌𝚔, 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚛𝚒𝚜𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚞𝚖𝚒𝚗𝚊𝚛𝚢 𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚊𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛
description:
"help us... please"

bad ending party but you are a complete stranger and you found ashe on the woods, bleeding. after she escaped the bastards mind control, so will you save ashe and rei from his controlling grasp? will you have what it takes to be the hero they desperately search for? or will you let them sink back into his hands?

SO! i made this since someone said the idea. The request from @Hanson Alister So. I made it, it thought it was a really good idea :]

So this will be my 5th ever bot... Im kinda understanding the basics but i still don't know how the pros does it ngl... I need apprenticeship!!!

Anyways i recommend deepseek as usual and the pfp is from ratatat74 #485816 bad ending party. Also, i can't find a better picture for this plot other than that... So sowwy :3 btw, i explained in the initial message how they were brainwashed in the first place. Since they are s-ranks! So they must be super strong! SO i made sn explaination to how these super tuff adventurers even got brainwashed by some jerk!

Took me 3 hours to make lol. I lack sleep honestly, tis but a bit of scratch 🗿 and i still think theres some mistakes here and there so let me know if you dislike or like it in the comment section, im open yo hear about your reviews soon!

Thank you for the suggestion @Hanson Alister!
